message:
✨ Auto-launch AI CLI (copilot/claude) in new terminals (#37)

- Detect available AI CLIs (copilot, claude) at server startup
- Add GET /api/ai-clis endpoint to report available CLIs
- POST /api/terminals accepts optional aiCli param
- Terminal auto-types the CLI command 500ms after shell spawn
- Web + button shows menu: available AI CLIs + plain Shell option
- First tab on mount auto-launches the first available AI CLI
- Tab name defaults to the chosen CLI name

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
